---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What's wrong?

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Actual behavior (with evidence)

What actually happened — include the literal log line, JSON output,
or Slack message received. Per `leadpilot-docs/testing/definition-of-done.md`,
"it looked wrong" isn't enough — show the actual output.

## Impact

Does this affect prioritization accuracy, duplicate-contact
prevention, document validation, or the security guard? If it touches
security, also check `leadpilot-docs/security/threat-model.md` to see
if this is a known failure mode.

## Environment

- Run type: scheduled / manual
- Relevant lead/case (redact real PII if this involves real client data)
